overall.description: A ship simulator game showing a first-person view from the vessel's bridge at night. The ship navigates through a harbor channel while a lightning flash briefly illuminates the bow. Three navigation displays show radar, chart, and depth information.

agents.ego_description: operating the ship's helm and navigating through the harbor channel using the bridge instrumentation

entered.detail: electronic chart display showing the harbor channel and vessel position
circular radar screen with rotating sweep showing surrounding targets
blue screen showing water depth and sonar readings
the forward deck and railings of the vessel visible through the bridge windows
metal railings on the port side of the bow
dark water surface of the harbor channel ahead

segments.scene_description: The view from a ship's bridge at night, showing three illuminated navigation displays and the bow of the vessel moving through calm harbor waters. The radar rotates steadily while the electronic chart tracks the vessel's progress through the channel.

events.description: bright lightning flash illuminates the entire bow and surrounding water

agents.ego_description: continuing to navigate the vessel through the harbor as lightning strikes nearby

segments.scene_description: A sudden lightning flash bathes the ship's bow in bright white light, momentarily illuminating the harbor waters before returning to darkness. The navigation displays remain active and visible throughout the brief electrical storm.

events.description: navigation light or buoy becomes visible on the starboard side of the channel

agents.ego_description: proceeding through the harbor channel toward the open water or destination

entered.detail: white navigation light or buoy visible on the starboard side of the channel

changed.to: showing progressed position deeper in the channel

segments.scene_description: The vessel continues its steady progress through the harbor channel after the storm passes. A navigation light appears on the starboard side as the ship approaches the channel marker, with all bridge instrumentation functioning normally.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a continuous first-person perspective from a ship's bridge at night as it navigates a harbor channel through a sudden electrical storm. It begins with a view of the vessel's bow moving through calm waters, framed by three illuminated navigation displays where a radar rotates and an electronic chart tracks the ship's progress. As the vessel advances, a sudden flash of lightning bathes the bow and surrounding harbor in bright white light before the environment quickly returns to darkness. The scene then shifts back to a steady glide through the channel as the storm passes, with the bridge instrumentation remaining active. Finally, the camera tracks forward as a navigation light appears on the starboard side, signaling the ship's approach to a channel marker.
